Aether_Wharf.name: The Aether Wharf
Aether_Wharf.description: A floating dock made of splintered white wood. A rusted skiff sways over the endless violet void below.

Sky_Bridge.name: The Shattered Sky Bridge
Sky_Bridge.description: A stone bridge that has snapped in the middle. Magic blue sparks leap across the gap.

Ruined_Keep.name: The Ruined Keep
Ruined_Keep.description: The crumbling remains of a throne room. A shattered crown sits on a pedestal of bone.
